title: Resolution Congratulating and Commending the Municipal Public Employment Service Office (PESO) Headed by Ms. Gliceria A. Trinidad for Being Conferred As the National Bayanihan Service Awardee for the 1st-2nd Class Municipality Category During the 21st National Peso Congress Held Virtually Last September 23, 2021. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 09/27/2021)
